title: pelecyphora dasyacantha
intro: Pelecyphora dasyacantha, also known as the beehive cactus or dasyacantha, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is known for its unique, beehive-like appearance due to the dense cluster of fine, white spines that cover its stems. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, salve, or infused oil, which can be applied topically to the affected area to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
